2603.18793.title: Functional Subspace Watermarking for Large Language Models
2603.18793.paper_summary: Model watermarking utilizes internal representations to protect the ownership of large language models (LLMs). However, these features inevitably undergo complex distortions during realistic model modifications such as fine-tuning, quantization, or knowledge distillation, making reliable extraction extremely challenging. Despite extensive research on model-side watermarking, existing methods still lack sufficient robustness against parameter-level perturbations. To address this gap, we propose \texttt{\textbf{Functional Subspace Watermarking (FSW)}}, a framework that anchors ownership signals into a low-dimensional functional backbone. Specifically, we first solve a generalized eigenvalue problem to extract a stable functional subspace for watermark injection, while introducing an adaptive spectral truncation strategy to achieve an optimal balance between robustness and model utility. Furthermore, a vector consistency constraint is incorporated to ensure that watermark injection does not compromise the original semantic performance. Extensive experiments across various LLM architectures and datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior detection accuracy and statistical verifiability under multiple model attacks, maintaining robustness that outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
2603.18793.paper_summary_zh: 模型水印技術利用內部表示來保護大型語言模型（LLMs）的所有權。<lb/>然而，這些特徵在現實模型修改過程中不可避免地會經歷複雜的扭曲，例如微調、量化或知識蒸餾，使得可靠的提取變得極具挑戰性。<lb/>儘管在模型端水印方面進行了廣泛的研究，但現有方法仍然缺乏對參數級擾動的足夠魯棒性。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了\texttt{\textbf{功能子空間水印（FSW）}}，這是一個將所有權信號固定在低維功能骨幹中的框架。<lb/>具體而言，我們首先解決一個廣義特徵值問題，以提取穩定的功能子空間進行水印注入，同時引入自適應光譜截斷策略，以實現魯棒性和模型效用之間的最佳平衡。<lb/>此外，還引入了一個向量一致性約束，以確保水印注入不會妨礙原始語義性能。<lb/>在各種LLM架構和數據集上進行的廣泛實驗表明，我們的方法在多種模型攻擊下實現了卓越的檢測準確性和統計可驗證性，保持了超越現有最先進（SOTA）方法的魯棒性。
2603.18793.author: Zikang Ding et.al.
2603.18793.authors: Zikang Ding, Junhao Li, Suling Wu, Junchi Yao, Hongbo Liu, Lijie Hu
